title: WalCdcNats
description: JetStream subjects owned by dd-wal-gateway-rs for Postgres logical-replication CDC. The wal2json plugin emits one message per row change; the gateway translates it into '<prefix>.<schema>.<table>.<op>' (op = I|U|D).

subjects.name: CdcRowChange
subjects.description: Per-row change emitted by wal-gateway. Subject pattern is '<prefix>.<schema>.<table>.<op>'. The default prefix is 'cdc' and the default stream name is 'CDC'. Consumers usually subscribe to the prefix tail wildcard ('cdc.>').

streams.name: CDC
streams.description: Default JetStream stream for the wal-gateway publish path. Overridable via WAL_GATEWAY_STREAM_NAME.
